message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Parteien und Wähler in der DDR – politische Einstellungen 1988/89","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.7656","justification":"Survey in the GDR at the end of the 1980s on political attitudes, parties and democracy; fielded immediately before the 1990 transition, used to study political behaviour and attitudes in the GDR context relevant for early‑1990s transformations."},{"title":"Demokratisierung und Wahlen in der DDR 1990","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0105","justification":"Study on democratisation and the 1990 Volkskammer election in the GDR; directly addresses elections, political behaviour and attitudes, and new governmental structures in the German Democratic Republic during 1990."},{"title":"Volkskammerwahl 1990 (DDR) – Nachwahlbefragung","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.0099","justification":"Post‑election survey for the 18 March 1990 Volkskammer election in the GDR; focuses on electoral behaviour, party choice, and political attitudes under the last GDR government in 1990."},{"title":"Kommunalwahlen in der DDR 1989/90","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4016","justification":"Data on local (municipal) elections and the transition from manipulated 1989 local elections to democratised local politics in 1990; links community/urban‑rural politics with elections and political organisation in the GDR."},{"title":"Politische Kultur in Ostdeutschland 1991–1998","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4017","justification":"Panel/series on political culture and attitudes in the eastern German Länder composed of the former GDR; covers most of the 1990s and analyses continuity and change of GDR‑shaped political orientations after unification."},{"title":"Transformation des politischen Systems in Ostdeutschland 1990–1994","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4018","justification":"Study of the transformation of political institutions and party system in the territory of the former GDR during the early 1990s; focuses on government structures, parties and citizen political behaviour in East Germany."},{"title":"Soziale und politische Ungleichheit in Ostdeutschland 1990–1999","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4019","justification":"Longitudinal survey of eastern German residents (former GDR citizens) over the 1990s on social structure, political attitudes and participation; links GDR biographies with 1990s political behaviour and evaluations of new institutions."},{"title":"Wahlen und Wähler in Ostdeutschland 1990–1998","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4020","justification":"Election studies focusing on voters in the eastern Bundesländer that are territorially identical with the former GDR; includes several federal, Land and local elections during the 1990s and analyses electoral behaviour, parties and political attitudes."},{"title":"Kommunale Demokratie in Ostdeutschland 1991–1997","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4021","justification":"Research on local self‑government and municipal politics in the eastern German regions of the former GDR across the 1990s; addresses community, urban and rural political life and local governmental institutions after the GDR period."},{"title":"Politische Einstellungen und Partizipation ehemaliger DDR‑Bürger 1990–1997","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.4022","justification":"Surveys tracking former GDR citizens’ political attitudes and participation in the 1990s; focuses on continuity of GDR political socialisation, engagement with the new political system, and behaviour in elections and organisations."}]}
